title: HAIRs risk assessments: mosquitoes and ticks
body: "  CCHS navigation menu:  CCHS homepageTopic: health impacts Vector-borne disease: mosquitoes, ticksPart of: diagnosis and prevention   Key resources for HAIRs:   HAIRS risk assessment process Appendix A. Risk review statement template Appendix B. Assessing the quality of evidence and confidence in the risk Appendix C. Zoonotic risk algorithms (with accessible text versions) Appendix D. Emerging infection algorithms (with accessible text versions) Appendix E. Risk management options   HAIRs for mosquitoes:   HAIRs risk assessment: Zika Virus HAIRs risk assessment: Chikungungya HAIRs risk assessment: West Nile virus HAIRs risk assessment: Dengue fever HAIRS risk assessment: Usutu virus   HAIRs for ticks:   HAIRS risk assessment: emerging tick-borne bacteria in the UK HAIRS risk assessment: Crimean-Congo haemorrhagic fever (CCHF) HAIRS risk assessment: tick-borne encephalitis   "
